productDisplayName: Puma Women Bodytrain White Sports Shoes
description: These stylish Bodytrain shoes from puma tone the front and back leg muscles to enhance natural movement and improve your overall look. These lightweight shoes are great for regular wear since they have an attractive low-profile design. You can team these with jeans and tees.UpperSynthetic leather and mesh uppers for durability and protectionCentral lace upsPadded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortpuma formstripes on the sidesBrand name appliqued on the tongue and cat logo on velcro closureMidsoleEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Soft-density IdCell technology compresses the midsole to create resistance as you moveIdCell technology continues through the front of the sole to create resistance and increased muscle activation in the front of your legs and calvesOutsoleBevelled heel maximises leg extension in each strideGroove running the length of the sole counteracts pronation and increases stabilityshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
